policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: previously purchased. UNDERSTANDING OUR SOURCES OF GHG EMISSIONS Charter accounts for GHG emissions in both our operations and value chain in line with the concepts of “scope” defined in the GHG Protocol. Charter’s GHG emissions consist of the following for the years presented: Direct emissions produced from assets Charter owns or controls, namely from fleet, natural gas, corporate-owned aircraft, building generators and fugitive emissions from refrigerants and fire suppression systems Indirect emissions from electricity and steam purchased by Charter Select other indirect emissions produced upstream and downstream of Charter’s operations, namely corporate air travel by commercial airlines, material energy and energy use for various devices – STBs, small network equipment (“SNE”) and mobile devices that are either owned or controlled by our customers SCOPE 1 SCOPE 2 SCOPE 3 For additional information, see Carbon neutral by 2035 and Value chain. MT CO2e11 2023 2022 2021 Fleet 362,479 341,148 327,462 Other Operational Emissions12 69,025 62,659 48,247 Scope 1 Total 431,504 403,807 375,709 Scope 2 Total13 1,105,788 1,108,972 1,057,823 Scope 1 and 2 Total 1,537,292 1,512,779 1,433,532 STB and SNE14 771,336 801,811 926,838 Mobile 179,369 121,150 78,111 Corporate Air Travel 6,643 6,824 2,834 Scope 3 Total 957,348 929,785 1,007,783

records.original_snippet_en: Manual PDF-page validation accepted this direct-use Scope value. Source file: 2023 CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS esg-report.pdf. PDF page: 22. Reported value: 431,504 tCO2e.
records.original_snippet_zh: 已逐页核对 PDF 原文、Scope 语境、数值和单位换算；该行进入直接采信层。
